items.next_action: Enter G1 through C1 without collapsing local gates. Before any G1 consumer depends on H7, require exact typed verification of promoted candidate c8df5d20b7bd87e09288689e6ef44ab56cabc3c8ce9a3ff95271262b3e9f4433, its claims, non-claims, supersession status, and retained blockers; generic promoted state is insufficient.
items.proof: R0.2-R0.5 establish compiler/bootstrap continuity. H1 proves reference provenance and the absence of a recovered mesh or rig. H2 proves a strict 17-joint structural profile; H3 proves deterministic capability-free generation with fixed candidate fingerprint 4d04df0dd58cdd8ecdb7c41e9dbde2dec1910b36b7d5643b2d254ef4b3c707fa. H4 binds that candidate and the exact reference/control fingerprints into an orthogonal integer matrix: edge deficit 1 detects only broken connection, rest front-span loss 480 detects only silhouette collapse, and frame-one hand vertical displacement 480 detects only articulation drift. Five H4 tests reject missing controls, stale bindings, cross-sensitive or post-hoc claims, unknown fields, and noncanonical bytes. P13-P15 enforce pixel-level asset fitness, substage-bound macro/micro refresh, and cheapest-sufficient simulation. Original-resolution inspection of Forge capture c85653f3329d164ea07f0dca334de05879faab4d17e65ac00ab1e9eed764840e confirms a clean UI capture but only a tiny stick skeleton, so it is rejected as a good-quality human reference while retained for structural tests. N0-N3 now add the complete Forge/game manifestation audit, P16 natural-method candidate gate, nineteen-module boundary, and eight-test capability-free grounded-search portfolio. The portfolio proves deterministic bounded traces, hard-constraint and budget failure, a deceptive semantic case, a cheaper synthetic Forge diagnosis path, independent morphology/network adapters, the selective-aging presentation formula, and a misleading-resistance negative-transfer case that rejects solver universality. K1 proves live lossless capture plus deterministic multi-facet v2 routing for plans, philosophies, requirements, constraints, preferences, risks, decisions, corrections, research, questions, observations, tasks and context; 3,226 current v2 facets are category/actor searchable while 257 v1 rows remain retained, and the complete Forge gate passes. H5 binds the owner-approved cute/sweet stylized feminine target to pixel-inspected PolyOne preview SHA-256 f3242d18b962103ec0b78fe424baf01db60c84d2c2a6f468c85d27818c145051, records strong/commanding masculine direction, keeps neutral construction and shaders modular, and explicitly withholds asset-import, topology, rig, runtime, and promotion authority; its complete Forge gate passes. No classifier, grounded-search adapter, observation, replay, or recovery path can edit canonical plans, approve, promote, dispatch, execute, import an asset, select a runtime, or mutate protected authority. H6 recovery and H7 proof-baseline promotion now pass. H7 adds no surface asset, topology, rig, animation, ageing visual, runtime, device-performance, application, or production claim; future G1 consumers must validate its exact typed package rather than generic promoted state.
